item.title: Connection failures for organizations restricting GitHub access by IP address
item.description: [major] identified — We have identified an issue affecting organizations that restrict GitHub access by source IP address. A recent infrastructure change altered the IP addresses Anthropic uses for outbound connections to GitHub, which may cause Claude Code remote sessions, GitHub Enterprise plugin

item.title: Elevated errors across multiple models
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.5 and Sonnet 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.5
item.description: [minor] identified — The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident has been resolved. Error rates were elevated between 5:20 PT / 12:48 PT and 6:48 PT / 13:48 PT.

item.title: claude.ai and API unavailable
item.description: [critical] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident is resolved. The elevated error rate was between 05:37 PT / 12:37 UTC and 06:58 PT / 13:37 UTC.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident is now resolved. The impact was between 16:25 PT / 23:25 UTC and 16:33 PT / 23:33 UTC.

item.title: Claude.ai unavailable and elevated errors on the API
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident has now been resolved. The timeline for the elevated errors was 6:22 PT / 13:22 UTC -> 6:39 PT / 13:39 UTC.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident has now been resolved. The elevated error rate for Haiku 4.5 was between 4:53 PT / 11:53 UTC and 5:36 PT / 12:44 UTC.

item.title: Claude Code Code Review was intermittently failing
item.description: [none] resolved — Claude Code Code Review intermittently wasn't starting sessions.

item.title: Elevated billing related errors on Claude.ai
item.description: [none] resolved — This incident has been resolved.
